CTN 4, 002 [Enuma Anu Enlil 05][via cams/gkab]

o i 1'o 1'

[...] ⸢MUD⸣ [...] x [...]

(o i 1') [...]

o i 2'2'

[...] ⸢GE₆⸣ MU BI LUGAL ŠU₂ x [...]

(o i 2') [...] ... is dark: in that year the king of the world ... [...].

o i 3'3'

[...] A ZA₃ ina IGI dEN.LIL₂ ana KUR ana MUNUS.ḪUL ⸢u₂⸣-[rad]

(o i 3') [...] ...: Enlil will descend on the land for evil.

o i 4'4'

[...] x IGI x DUMU-[MEŠ]-ši-⸢na⸣ ana KU₃.BABBAR ⸢BUR₂⸣-[MEŠ]

(o i 4') [...] (people) will dispose of their sons for silver.

o i 5'5'

[...] IGI BAL KUR₂ ZI-šu₂ KUR ana DU₆ u kar-me ⸢GUR⸣

(o i 5') [...] ...: an enemy - his attack will turn the land into mounds and ruins.

o i 6'6'

[...] ⸢IGI⸣.DU₈.A ⸢ITI⸣ [...] KI.MIN MUL-MEŠ ⸢IGI⸣-MEŠ

(o i 6') [...] monthly visibility [...] alternatively, the stars appear: [...] the Moon ... enemy [...] alternatively, [...] star [...] ... a throne of peace.1

o i 7'7'

[...] d30 KUR₂ [...] ⸢KI⸣.MIN

o i 8'8'

[...] MUL [...] x giš⸢GU⸣.ZA NE.ḪA

o i 9'9'

[...] x x RA nap-ša₂ GU₇

(o i 9') [...] will enjoy plentiful ....

o i 10'10'

[...] x AN MA DA x : SU IM ME A UB

(o i 10') [...] ....

o i 11'11'

[...] ina ZA₃-⸢šu₂⸣ [...] ⸢ID⸣ ina IGI AN x x ana U₄ MUNUS.ḪUL LA₂ar₂

(o i 11') [...] on its right [...] ... in front of ... for a day of evil ....

o i 12'12'

[...] ⸢UN⸣-MEŠ x-MEŠ [...]-x-ši-na KI.MIN DUMU-MEŠ-ši-na ana KU₃.BABBAR BUR₂-MEŠ

(o i 12') [...] the ... people will dispose of their [...], alternatively, their sons, for silver.

o i 13'13'

[...] GUB₃ IGI BI [...] MAŠ ID TAB IGI BAL KUR₂

(o i 13') [...] left ... [...] ...: the reign will change.

o i 14'14'

[...] LUGAL KUR₂ ZI-ma IRI u giš⸢GU⸣.ZA ana DU₆ u kar-me GUR

(o i 14') [...] a hostile king will arise and turn the city and throne into mounds and ruins.

o i 15'15'

[...] IGI BI A x DINGIR-⸢MEŠ⸣ NIGIN₂at₂ UŠ₂.UŠ₂ ina KUR ⸢GAL₂⸣-MEŠ : GAR-MEŠ

(o i 15') [...] surrounded ... the gods: there will be deaths in the land (or): (they) will be brought about.

o i 16'16'

[...] LUGAL ina la di-bi-ri KI.MIN ina la KI-šu₂ ŠUBut

(o i 16') [...] a king will die without calamity, alternatively, not in his place.

o i 17'17'

[...] EREN₂-⸢MEŠ⸣ ina gišTUKUL KUR₂ i-gam-mar ŠE ⸢sa⸣-ma-nu GU₇

(o i 17') [...] troops will destroy the enemy with weapons. The samanu-demon will devour the barley.

o i 18'18'

[...] ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ tal₂-a-šu₂ TAG : AN.GE₆ AN.USAN₂ UDU.IDIM

(o i 18') [...] sesame will be affected with grain pest : eclipse in the evening, a planet [...]. 3 eclipses: Ninimma ....

o i 19'19'

[...] 3 AN.GE₆ dNIN.IMMA₃ x NA

o i 20'20'

* SIG₇ AN.GE₆ šu-ba-ri UDU.IDIM-MEŠ x-⸢MEŠ⸣

(o i 20') (If the moon) is yellow-green: eclipse of Subartu. The planets will ....

o i 21'21'

[...] MI [...] NAM.UŠ₂-MEŠ GAR-⸢MEŠ⸣

(o i 21') [...] ... [...]: epidemics will occur.

o i 22'22'

* da-aʾ-mat BURU₅? gišGI-MEŠ GU₇ gišŠINIG u gišx

(o i 22') (If the moon) is dark: locust(s) will devour the reed-beds. Tamarisk and .....

o i 23'23'

[...] a-ri-bu [...] x x AŠ i-ḫar-ra-⸢aṣ⸣

(o i 23') [...] locust(s) [...] ... will break off.

o i 24'24'

* 30 ina IGI.⸢LA₂-šu₂⸣ [...] x la₃ ik-ta-la GAL₂u₂ ⸢MUL⸣ [x] GUB

(o i 24') (If) the moon at its appearance [...] ... not held back ... exist: the ... star stands (there).

o i 25'25'

* AN x [...] x PI PAD KUR BI x MAR GAR GAR [...]

(o i 25') (If) ... [...] ... [...].

o i 26'26'

* 30 ina IGI.LA₂-šu₂ SI ZA₃-šu₂ ik-bir GANBA ŠE ⸢LA₂⸣ [x] SIG₅

(o i 26') (If) the moon at its appearance - its right horn thickens: the price of grain will diminish. [...] will prosper.

o i 27'27'

[*] SI GUB₃-šu₂ ik-bir GANBA ŠE.GIŠ.I₃ LA₂ [x] SIG₅

(o i 27') (If) its left horn thickens: the price of sesame will diminish. [...] will prosper.

o i 28'28'

[*] SI ZA₃-šu₂ nam-rat u GE₆at AD.ḪAL ⸢NUN E₃⸣

(o i 28') (If) its right horn is bright and dark: the prince's secret will come out.

o i 29'29'

[*] ⸢SI⸣ GUB₃-šu₂ nam-rat u GE₆at AD.ḪAL KUR₂ ⸢E₃⸣

(o i 29') (If) its left horn is bright and dark: the enemy's secret will come out.

o i 30'30'

[*] SI ZA₃-šu₂ ANe ṭe-rat GANBA GI.⸢NA⸣ ina ⸢KUR GAL₂⸣

(o i 30') (If) its right horn is penetrating heaven: there will be stable business in the land. There will be the imposition of rebellion in Amurru.

o i 31'31'

GARun [ḪI].GAR ina kurMAR.TU GAL₂

o i 32'32'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ ANe ṭe-rat GIG-MEŠ BAL-MEŠ ina ⸢KUR⸣ [GAL₂]-⸢MEŠ⸣

(o i 32') (If) its left horn is penetrating heaven: there will be ... sick people in the land. Alternatively, there will be rebellion in the land of Akkad.

o i 33'33'

KI.MIN ḪI.GAR ina kurURIki GAL₂

o i 34'34'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ KI IGI GANBA KUR TUR KI.MIN UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR ⸢GAL₂-MEŠ⸣

(o i 34') (If) its right horn faces the ground: the business of the land will reduce. Alternatively, there will be deaths in the land. Alternatively, the king of Amurru - his slaves will kill him in rebellion.

o i 35'35'

KI.MIN LUGAL MAR.TU ARAD-MEŠ-šu₂ ina ḪI.GAR GAZ-MEŠ-šu

o i 36'36'

⸢* SI⸣ [...] ⸢IGI⸣ GIG-MEŠti KI.MIN UŠ₂-MEŠ ina KUR GAL₂-MEŠ

(o i 36') (If) its [...] horn faces [...]: there will be sick people, alternatively, deaths in the land. [...] - his slaves will kill him in rebellion.

o i 37'37'

[...]ki ⸢ARAD⸣-MEŠ-šu₂ ina ḪI.GAR ⸢GAZ-MEŠ⸣-šu₂

o i 38'38'

[... ṭe]-⸢rat⸣ GANBA ⸢ina KUR⸣ TUR

(o i 38') [...] is penetrating [...]: business in the land will reduce.

o i 39'39'

[... ṭe]-⸢rat⸣ GANBA ⸢KUR⸣ ina-pu₂-⸢uš⸣

(o i 39') [...] is penetrating [...]: business of the land will expand.

o i 40'40'

[... ṭe]-⸢rat⸣ GANBA KUR TUR

(o i 40') [...] is penetrating [...]: business of the land will reduce.

o i 41'41'

[...] x ṭe-rat

(o i 41') [...] is penetrating [...] will expand.

o i 42'42'

[... ina]-pu-uš

o ii 4'4'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ PA [...]

(o ii 4') (If) its right horn [...] a bifurcation: [...].

o ii 5'5'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ PA [...]

(o ii 5') (If) its left horn [...] a bifurcation: [...].

o ii 6'6'

* SI-MEŠ-šu₂ ZA₃ u GUB₃ [...]

(o ii 6') (If) its horns, on the right and on the left [...].

o ii 7'7'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ GID₂.DA [...]

(o ii 7') (If) its right horn is long: [...]

o ii 8'8'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ GID₂.DA la [...]

(o ii 8') (If) its left horn is long: not [...].

o ii 9'9'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ LUGUD₂.DA x [...]

(o ii 9') (If) its right horn is short: ... [...].

o ii 10'10'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ LUGUD₂.DA x [...]

(o ii 10') (If) its left horn is short: ... [...].

o ii 11'11'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ana ŠA₃nu GIM gam-[li₃ ...]

(o ii 11') (If) its right horn [...] to the inside like a throwing-stick: [...].

o ii 12'12'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ ana ŠA₃nu ⸢GIM gam⸣-[li₃ ...]

(o ii 12') (If) its left horn [...] to the inside like a throwing-stick: [...].

o ii 13'13'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ana ki-da-[nu ...]

(o ii 13') (If) its right horn [...] to the outside [...] Amurru ... [...].

o ii 14'14'

kurMAR.TU x [...]

o ii 15'15'

⸢* SI GUB₃-šu₂⸣ [...]

(o ii 15') (If) its left horn [...] Akkad ... [...].

o ii 16'16'

kurURIki x [...]

o ii 17'17'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ke-⸢pat?⸣ [...]

(o ii 17') (If) its right horn is bent back [...].

o ii 18'18'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ ⸢ke-pat⸣ [...]

(o ii 18') (If) its left horn is bent back [...].

o ii 19'19'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ana ki-[da-nu ...]

(o ii 19') (If) its right horn [...] to the outside [...].

o ii 20'20'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ ana ⸢ki-da⸣-nu ⸢kun-nu⸣ [...]

(o ii 20') (If) its left horn is correct to the outside [...].

o ii 21'21'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ⸢MAŠ.SILA₃⸣ : MI [...]

(o ii 21') (If) its right horn ... the flank [...].

o ii 22'22'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ MAŠ.SILA₃ MU : [...]

(o ii 22') (If) its left horn ... the flank [...].

o ii 23'23'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ ⸢nam⸣-rat UL [...]

(o ii 23') (If) its right horn is bright: ... [...].

o ii 24'24'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ ⸢nam⸣-rat UL [...]

(o ii 24') (If) its left horn is bright: ... [...].

o ii 25'25'

* SI ZA₃-⸢šu₂⸣ ṣalₓ(SAL)-mat ⸢GANBA⸣ [...]

(o ii 25') (If) its right horn is dark: business [...].

o ii 26'26'

* SI GUB₃-⸢šu₂⸣ ṣalₓ(SAL)-mat ⸢GANBA⸣ [...]

(o ii 26') (If) its left horn is dark: business [...].

o ii 27'27'

* SI ZA₃-⸢šu₂⸣ GID₂.DA-ma SI ⸢GUB₃⸣-[šu₂ ...]

(o ii 27') (If) its right horn is long and its left horn [...]: a king [...] a land which is not his.

o ii 28'28'

LUGAL ⸢KUR⸣ la₃ UR₅tu₂ [...]

o ii 29'29'

* SI GUB₃-[šu₂] GID₂.DA-ma SI [...]

(o ii 29') (If) its left horn is long and [...] horn [...] the king and his own people [...].

o ii 30'30'

LUGAL u ⸢UN⸣-MEŠ-šu₂ ra-ma-niš [...]

o ii 31'31'

* SI ⸢ZA₃⸣-šu₂ GID₂.DA-⸢ma⸣ AN [...]

(o ii 31') (If) its right horn is long and [...] heaven: [...].

o ii 32'32'

* SI GUB₃-⸢šu₂⸣ GID₂.DA-ma AN [...]

(o ii 32') (If) its left horn is long and [...] heaven: [...].

o ii 33'33'

* SI ZA₃-šu₂ GID₂.DA-ma KI [...]

(o ii 33') (If) its right horn is long and [...] earth: [...].

o ii 34'34'

* ⸢SI GUB₃-šu₂⸣ GID₂.DA-ma ⸢KI⸣ [...]

(o ii 34') (If) its left horn is long and [...] earth: [...].

o ii 35'35'

* SI ⸢ZA₃⸣-šu₂ AN ina-ṭal ⸢GANBA⸣ [...]

(o ii 35') (If) its right horn is long and faces heaven: business [...].

o ii 36'36'

* SI ⸢GUB₃⸣-šu₂ AN ina-ṭal GIG-[MEŠ ...]

(o ii 36') (If) its left horn is long and faces heaven: sick people [...].

o ii 37'37'

* SI ⸢ZA₃⸣-šu₂ ana 2-šu₂ zi-za-at [...]

(o ii 37') (If) its right horn is divided in 2 [...].

o ii 38'38'

* SI GUB₃-šu₂ ana 2-šu₂ zi-za-at x [...]

(o ii 38') (If) its left horn is divided in 2 [...]: the king and his people will be at peace.

o ii 39'39'

⸢LUGAL u⸣ UN-MEŠ-šu₂ SILIM-MEŠ
